body.u: At school we were just starting are exams, I was hoppinghoping I would get my woodwork therytheory and my woodwork practical and if I triydtried hard my techehaltechnicalDrowingdrawing and Art. The Job I had {riten?}written away for was a prentishipapprenticeship with my brothers eletrishen’selectricians for me. I was only 15 ½ years old, I wishetwished I coldcould have a yamaharYamaha 100cc motorsicalmotorcycle but I hathad to be 17 years old to have one. So I hathad to watwaittootwo years, that semedseemed a life time but it came along the day had cumecome when I coldcould go down the motorsicalmotorcycle shop and biybuy my first motorsicalmotorcycle {illegible} my crash helmithelmet so I coldcouldriedride it home. I {illegible} to the shop a {illegible} where by and then there I was riding my owenownmotorsicalmotorcycle along the raidroad on my way home to show my mum and dad my new toy. The next day a letter came for me to asceask me to go for an {illegible} with my brothers furmefirm, I was thrildthrilled. The day came when I hathad to go for the interview, I put on my best clowsclothes and tiytie and set ofoff I was so serves I got ofoff the bus a stop totoosonesoon and hathad to walk a millmile. AventuleyEventually I got there and the secuterysecuritysedesaid “Go stratstraight in he’s watingwaiting for you” so all of a tremble I went in, he stood up and shock my hand and I sat down we talcttalkedfofor a wilewhile and then the manajermanagersedesaid “that’s all Mr Marchant werwe'll send you the anseranswer in the post. When I got home my key was redey lick {yochel?}. Tootwo weeks went by and I had not hirdheard from the furmefirm. I thortthought they didentdidn'twontwant me and the next day a letter came for me, it was the one it sedesaid that I hadehad the job. Then the day came my first day at work I got up at 6 O clock I was redeyready a 6.30 I didendidn't have to be at work to 7 O clock. I got there on time the man I was mentmeant to work with met me at the gatsgates.
